DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Points to the sibling 'postgres' service (postgres:16-alpine, NOT the postgres-ssl:18 plugin — see postgres/.env.example for the lost+found parent-mount geometry). Literal credentials match the defaults defined in postgres/template-vars.json so marketplace first-time deploys authenticate out of the box.

BASE_URL.description: Public URL for Plausible instance. Auto-set from Railway public domain.

SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: 64-byte random string for cookie signing secrets. Auto-generated.

CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE_URL.description: ClickHouse connection URL with companion service credentials

DISABLE_REGISTRATION.description: Set to true to disable public registration after creating admin account.

ENABLE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION.description: Set to true to require email verification for new users.
